assessment_objectives.objective: Automated Decision-Making Technology (ADMT), where computation replaces, or substantially replaces, human decision-making for data subject actions, are identified.

applicable statutory, regulatory and/or contractual obligations for Automated Decision-Making Technology (ADMT), where computation replaces, or substantially replaces, human decision-making for data subject actions, are identified.

the use of Automated Decision-Making Technology (ADMT), where computation replaces, or substantially replaces, human decision-making for data subject actions, conforms with all applicable statutory, regulatory and/or contractual obligations.
